name: Nicole McNeil
role: Baby Shower · August 2026 (TBD) · 30 guests · Dorchester Boston

handling.tone: McNeil is Scottish/Irish — Anglo or Irish-American heritage. Day 1 was heavy (3 calls, 2 emails resent, cadence text) — she may have felt overwhelmed. Don't pile on; one warm specific message.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: brief, respect she's busy (probably pregnant or close to someone who is). Frame as 'we make YOU look good as the host.'
handling.context: Inbound Apr 23 from FB Lead Form. Baby shower in August — no specific date locked. 30 guests = small intimate. $945 ballpark. Apr 24 had more call attempts but no answer. Day 1 was heavy and didn't land.

context_anchors: Dorchester Boston, 02124 — urban core, easy logistics
Baby shower in August 2026 — no specific day
Day 1 push was heavy — back off, warm and specific

lead.source: FB Lead Form — VIDEO RODS WEDDING & FACELESS
lead.next_move: One specific warm message asking date lock + brunch vibe vs afternoon tea/apps

enrichment.identity_notes: Scottish/Irish surname suggests Anglo or Irish-American heritage. Dorchester is one of Boston's largest neighborhoods, demographically diverse. FB ad targeted weddings; she opted in for baby shower (broad-targeting expected).
win_angles: Right-size — 30 guests + baby shower = drop-off + light service most likely
Hostess emotional driver — make HER look good as host
Brunch/lunch timing 11 AM-3 PM, mocktail focus (pregnant guests)
Specific date locking is next milestone
Day 1 was heavy — don't pile on
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hi Nicole — quick check-in. For baby shower in August, do you have a specific date locked yet? August dates fill fast on our side. Also, mid-day brunch vibe or afternoon tea / appetizer style?'
Frame: 'For a friend, family member, or you yourself? Helps me know who I'm helping you make look great.'
Anchor: 'For 30 guests at baby shower: drop-off ($X), light buffet with attendant ($Y), full hosted ($Z). Most baby showers I do land in middle.'
enrichment.strategic_note: Small, simple, tractable IF we can re-engage. Day 1's heavy push didn't land — she may have felt overwhelmed. ONE warm, specific message respecting she's busy, asking date question. Don't pile on more touches.

comms.summary: Two more call attempts, no answer

notes: Don't pile on — Day 1 was already heavy
Specific date locking is the unlock
